reviews.review_title: I just wish the cars where faster
reviews.review_description: Make the cars run faster and stop cheating out the icons you grab, they change to poison mode if you are winning the race, it becomes annoying
It's like Mario kart pretty fun graphics are a 3 out of 5 but very fun game worth the $2.99
I love everything about the game except when the computer hits me i stop. Could use some polishing but overall a lot of fun.
The bad reviews are based on the game not working on some phones and I almost skipped this gem. Runs flawlessly on my s8+. Looks beautiful, very fun. Everything you expect it to be.
I think this is a great game, 1st perspective Mario Cart! I can’t seem to get the online multiplayer option going though....

I didn't expect much from this game. But it is actually my favorite purchase thus far. The concept is pretty simple, but very well executed. It's challenging enough, without causing any frustration. My only suggestion would be to add an option to retry a race immediately without having to return to the game menu.

Really fun game, the team is small so I didn’t expect anything huge like Mario Kart. Has similar features like boosts and weapons which most of the times I can’t tell what I picked up or if it did anything when I click it. I’d like to see more wavy terrain and better functionality when bumping into players. I often can’t tell when I’m hit or when I hit someone else other than the weird slow down. Seems if a bot hits you from behind, you slow down but the opposite happens when you hit them. It has a good number of levels but not a lot of variation in the environment, you’re either turning left or turning right. I haven’t explored all the levels yet so there might be some.

I spent so many hours playing Mario Kart,  it is fun to go in this world VR style.  Everything works fine for me.  Graphics are fun and crisp.  

Well worth the few bucks i paid for it.  The kind of game i play when i have 8% battery and want a quick game before recharge

This game is brilliant. The graphics are cute and are much better than I've come to expect from games on the GO. The gameplay is smooth and incredibly fun. The player customisation is great and I hope the Devs continue to add new items and new tracks. 

Thank you for demonstrating the capabilities of this system. You have excelled where so many other
I love this little game.  Try it u will love it to.

Would like a refund also had to take motion pill to fix vertigo! 
game is good but not for me  wish I hadn't bought it taking a long time to recover the  feeling
As the title says, it's pretty great but it lost a star because I couldn't find any players for multiplayer
Great and fun game but doesn't do multiplayer as it states. So if you want to play against computers then get it but if you want play against friends and others,don't waste your money
Great racing game with multiple tracks and the bots are brutal.
Occulus Go can't press "A"

reviews.review_title: One of funnest games for Go!
reviews.review_description: I've had my Go for about 2 months and wanted a Mario Cart style game to play and this has got to be the closest thing you'll find. I've tried it with the Oculus controller and the Xbox controller and personally I favor the Oculus controller. Very easy to control. Fun boosts and weapons to fire at opponents. I Love it! I hope they keep adding more boards, and customization possibilities.
Loved it
very bad. I do not recommend it

reviews.review_title: Worked with oculus go controll at start.
reviews.review_description: I was excited about this game but then after the tutorials it requires a game pad... so I bought a game pad and everything is workin but the online part.. I can’t joking any online games or figure out how to invite friends to play together

I enjoy the game but am I missing something? Whenever a computer touches me from any angle I stop moving. How am I suppose to win when all the opponent has to do is hit me twice to win?  Also the multiplayer doesn't seem to work.
